phrases.intent_en: Ask where Arco do Conde de Vila Flor is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Arco do Conde de Vila Flor?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to it as a key photo spot along the water channel.

phrases.text_local: Onde há bons restaurantes perto da praça central?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee AH BOHNS res-taw-RAHN-tis PEHR-too DAH PRAH-sah sen-TRAHL

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia turístico local ou ao funcionário da câmara na Fonte das Portas de Moura.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL OHW OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh NUH FOHNG-tih DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local guide or city staff at the Fonte das Portas de Moura.

responses.english: Ask the local guide or city staff at the Fonte das Portas de Moura.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL OHW OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh NUH FOHNG-tih DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia turístico local ou ao funcionário da câmara na Fonte das Portas de Moura.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum nucleus is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente o núcleo museológico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AW NOOK-leeoo moo-zeeoo-LAW-zhee-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff prioritize precise street names over landmarks for navigation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Rua do Arco da Água.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH AHG-wuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on Rua do Arco da Água.

responses.english: Good morning, on Rua do Arco da Água.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH AHG-wuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Rua do Arco da Água.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the aqueduct museum is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Núcleo Museológico do Aqueduto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW NOOK-leeoo moo-zeeoo-LAW-zhee-koo DOO uh-kih-DOO-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum displays original engineering blueprints and tiles.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Núcleo Museológico.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW NOOK-leeoo moo-zeeoo-LAW-zhee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Aqueduct Museum.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Aqueduct Museum.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW NOOK-leeoo moo-zeeoo-LAW-zhee-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Núcleo Museológico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fonte das Portas is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica a Fonte das Portas?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH FOHNG-tih DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Fonte das Portas de Moura is a historic fountain in Évora, often a meeting point.

likely_response.translation_en: In the square, near the aqueduct.

responses.english: In the square, near the aqueduct.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Arco do Conde de Vila Flor is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Arco do Conde de Vila Flor?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo DOO KOHNG-dih DIH VEE-luh FLOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The arch is integrated into the aqueduct structure along that street.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um funcionário da câmara ou a um guia turístico local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a city staff member or a local tour guide.

responses.english: Ask a city staff member or a local tour guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
responses.french: Pergunte a um funcionário da câmara ou a um guia turístico local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the reservoir entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a entrada do reservatório?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO reh-zih-ruh-vuh-TAWR-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors must validate tickets before entering the paid reservoir zone.

likely_response.local: Pode dirigir-se ao bilheteiro para obter indicações.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih dee-ree-ZHEER-SIH OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: You can go to the ticket seller for directions.

responses.english: You can go to the ticket seller for directions.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih dee-ree-ZHEER-SIH OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Pode dirigir-se ao bilheteiro para obter indicações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fonte das Portas de Moura is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Fonte das Portas de Moura?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH FOHNG-tih DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The fountain is a landmark at the square of the same name, near the aqueduct.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no largo das Portas de Moura.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at Largo das Portas de Moura.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at Largo das Portas de Moura.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica no largo das Portas de Moura.
